stemHtml: You are at the holding point when you receive this clearance from the tower: “Fastair 345, after departure, climb to 4000 feet, turn right heading 270, report when turning. Runway 09, cleared for take-off.” After take-off at 4000 feet, you realize that you have a radio failure. At the turn, you make a blind transmission and say it twice. What is this transmission?

options.c: Fastair 345 continue VFR heading 270, reporting 12:01. All stations stop transmitting.
options.d: Fastair 345 continue VFR heading 270, next report final Runway 09 at time 1600.
